textPlain: There are so many good things in this video! The concept of ‘Platonic horror’ is going to be a useful one, I feel:> I think that what really titillates me is when the problem is beautiful, but the solution is upsetting. I call this a Platonic horror.
What in gods name…And then there’s call of duty in the middle of the paper…
Every year Tom7 gives us another enigma, and this year it's a real enigma of an enigma.
If you ever want to find out how overconfident you are in your own abilities, watch this video and be humbled.
